subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! In the letter from his honor Isma'íl, your blessed names were recited. The heart's desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء در نامه جناب اسمعیل نامهای مبارک شما تلاوت گردید آرزوی دل
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @importance of community building, @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause
